name: Woodkid
description:
'''Yoann Lemoine''' ({{IPA|fr|jɔan ləmwan}}; born 16 March 1983), known professionally as '''Woodkid''', is a French [[music video director]], [[graphic designer]], composer, and singer-songwriter. He first gained international recognition as a music video director before launching his recording career with the EP ''Iron'' (2011) and the studio album ''[[The Golden Age (Woodkid album)|The Golden Age]]'' (2013). He has also composed for films, television, video games and international events, including ''[[Desierto]]'', ''[[Arcane (TV series)|Arcane]]'', the [[Paris 2024]] handover sequence at the [[2020 Summer Olympics closing ceremony|Tokyo 2020 Olympic closing ceremony]], and ''[[Death Stranding 2: On the Beach]]''.

Woodkid has been nominated for three [[Grammy Awards]], four [[Camerimage]] Awards, one [[Ariel Award]], and won a [[Victoires de la Musique]] Award. As a musician and composer, he has collaborated with filmmakers, fashion houses, luxury brands, and video game developers, including [[Ubisoft]], [[Kojima Productions]], [[Louis Vuitton]], and [[Vacheron Constantin]]. His work is characterized by cinematic visual storytelling, orchestral arrangements, and recurring themes of mythology, industrialization, identity, and the transition from childhood to adulthood.
